C001.text:
--- END-OF-SHIFT HANDOFF 04/13/2026 — Coordinator: JT ---

Receipts completed today: 2
Receipts open at handoff: 0
NCRs issued today: 0
Quarantines applied today: 0
Escalations open: 0

OPEN RECEIPTS:
- None

OPEN NCRs AWAITING COORDINATOR ACTION:
- None

OPEN ESCALATIONS:
- None

QUARANTINE STATUS:
- Q-HOLD currently holds 1 entry totaling approximately $1,250.00. Re-inspections scheduled: REC-20260408-001 on 04/15/2026.

NOTES FOR TOMORROW:
- 5 appointments on the dock schedule for 04/14.
- SUP-0312 delivery expected — Probation supplier, Reggie inspection required.
- AX-04827-B2 stock at 34 units. Estes delivery (96 units PO MER-PO-106833) should replenish.

--- END HANDOFF ---
On shift as Dock Lead today. Crew: Marcus Toussaint. Docks 1-4 clear and ready.
Good morning. Coordinator SM on shift 06:00-14:30. 5 inbound appointments today per dock schedule. Probation supplier SUP-0312 (Heartland Bearings) expected at 11:00.

UNLOAD COMPLETE: REC-20260414-004, Consolidated Forge Works, PO #MER-PO-107295. Total pallets: 1. Count match: Y. Condition: Clean. Photos: N.

:warning: REC-20260414-003 in progress — SUP-0147, MER-PO-107294, FG-91144-A1 (forged gear blanks). SAFETY-CRITICAL. Qty 200 received, exact match to PO. Condition Tier 0. COC received and verified. :x: MTR NOT received. Cannot verify heat numbers H-8827-A/H-8827-B without MTR. Sending MTR request to supplier.
REC-003 update: MTR request email sent to Consolidated Forge Works at 10:15 CST. Awaiting supplier response.
REC-003 update: 200 units FG-91144-A1 moved to Q-HOLD. Quarantine tags applied. Location: Q-HOLD-DOCK3.

REC-003 update: NCR-MER-2026-0251 issued (Major, DOC). $15,600.00 (200 x $78.00). Letter sent to SUP-0147. Supplier response due 04/28/2026 (10 business days). Re-inspection event created for 04/21/2026.
<@U002> FYI — NCR-MER-2026-0251 for REC-003, $15,600.00. Details in NCR log and #escalations-meridian.
Noted, thanks. Keep me posted on the MTR — let me know if they don't deliver by COB.

Coordinator: SM

Line 001 (BG-33044-A1): 144 received, count matches PO. Some units have surface scratches on bearing races — pulling aside for closer look.
Line 002 (SL-20118-C3): 488 of 500 received. Short 12 units. Condition clean.

REC-20260414-005 in progress — SUP-0312 (Heartland Bearings, PROBATION). MER-PO-108510, 2 lines:
- Line 001: BG-33044-A1, safety-critical bearings. 144 received, matches PO. All docs (COC, MTR) received. Heat number H-4401-C verified.
- Line 002: SL-20118-C3, standard seals. 488 of 500 received. Short 12 units (-2.4%). Condition Tier 0.
Requesting Reggie for inspection.

Note on REC-007: Packing slip says 96 units AX-04827-B2, I count 78 on the dock. Recounted twice. 78 confirmed.
Thanks Curtis. Requesting quality inspection for REC-005 line 001 — potential Tier 2 damage on safety-critical bearings. <@U007> can you head to Dock 2?
REC-003 update: Consolidated Forge Works acknowledged MTR request at 11:40 CST. Supplier says MTR will be sent by COB today.
On my way.

:rotating_light: REC-20260414-007 receiving — SUP-0089, MER-PO-106833, AX-04827-B2 (axle housing forgings). SAFETY-CRITICAL. :warning: SHORT SHIP: 78 of 96 received (-18.75%). Condition Tier 0. All docs (COC, MTR) verified. Heat number H-6203-D confirmed. Quarantine required. Checking line-down risk.
REC-007 update: 78 units AX-04827-B2 moved to Q-HOLD. Quarantine tags applied. NCR-MER-2026-0253 drafted (Critical, QTY). $7,650.00 (18 missing x $425.00). Sending to <@U005> for review.

REC-007 update: Line-down risk confirmed by <@U008> at 12:30 CST. On-hand: 22 units. Consumption: 12/day. Risk window: ~1.8 days. :rotating_light: Line-down risk within 48 hours. Escalating to Elizabeth Velasquez. See #escalations-meridian.
REC-007 update: <@U005> approved NCR-MER-2026-0253 at 13:00 CST. Letter sent to Meridian Steel Supply (SUP-0089) at 13:15 CST. Supplier response due 04/17/2026 (3 business days). <@U004> CC'd.

REC-005 line 001 inspection complete. Posted full report in #quality-alerts. Summary: Tier 2 confirmed — 30 of 144 bearings have machined surface scratches on inner/outer races. Remaining 114 appear acceptable but entire lot quarantined pending disposition. See #quality-alerts for details and photos.
Thanks <@U007>. Confirming Tier 2 damage on REC-005 L001 — 30 of 144 affected. NCR-MER-2026-0252 drafted as Critical. $5,565.00 (30 damaged x $185.50). Sending draft to <@U005> for review.
NCR-0252 Critical draft sent to Theo Brandt at 13:30 CST. Awaiting approval before sending to supplier.

PUTAWAY AUTHORIZED: REC-20260414-006, Meridian Steel Supply (SUP-0089), 1 line.
- Line 001: DS-77201-A3, 60 units → BIN-A-08-02
Safety-critical. Qty exact match. All docs verified.
Coordinator: SM
REC-005 escalation posted to #escalations-meridian. Also posting repeat-offender flag — SUP-0312's 3rd NCR in 90 days (2 prior DMG NCRs + now NCR-0252). Notified <@U005>, <@U006>, and <@U003>.

C002.text:
INSPECTION REPORT — REC-20260408-001
Supplier: Great Plains Fasteners (SUP-0415)
SKU: FS-12050-A1 (Flanged sleeve)
Inspection type: Receiving — short ship verification
Findings: 50 of 57 units received. Condition Tier 0 on received units. Units are dimensionally conforming per spot check. Short quantity confirmed — 7 missing. NCR pending.
Disposition recommendation: Quarantine pending supplier response on missing units.

INSPECTION REPORT — REC-20260414-005, Line 001
Supplier: Heartland Bearings LLC (SUP-0312, Probation)
SKU: BG-33044-A1 (Precision bearing assemblies — safety-critical)
PO: MER-PO-108510
Inspection type: Receiving — damage assessment + Probation inspection

Findings:
- Total units received: 144 (matches PO)
- Units with visible damage: 30
- Damage type: Machined surface scratches on inner and outer bearing races
- Damage classification: Tier 2 — Functional damage (scratches on precision surfaces may affect bearing performance and tolerance)
- Remaining 114 units: Visual inspection shows no surface defects, but entire lot should remain quarantined per standard practice for safety-critical with Tier 2 damage
- Documentation: COC and MTR received and verified. Heat number H-4401-C matches.

Photos: 4 photos uploaded to shared drive — /receiving/2026-04-14/REC-005-L001-damage/
Marked-up packing slip: Annotated and sent to Coordinator via email.

Disposition recommendation: Quarantine entire lot. NCR required — Tier 2 on safety-critical.
Note: This supplier is on Probation (2 prior DMG NCRs in Q1).

C003.text: ESCALATION — DOLLAR VALUE TIER 2: REC-20260414-003, Consolidated Forge Works (SUP-0147), PO #MER-PO-107294, missing MTR on safety-critical forged gear blanks (FG-91144-A1). Dollar value: $15,600.00. Disposition: QUARANTINE. NCR: NCR-MER-2026-0251. Awaiting acknowledgement from <@U002>.

ESCALATION — DOLLAR VALUE TIER 2 + OVERRIDE (CRITICAL NCR + LINE-DOWN RISK): REC-20260414-007, Meridian Steel Supply (SUP-0089), PO #MER-PO-106833. Dollar value: $7,650.00. Override trigger: Band 3 critical short (-18.75%, 78 of 96) on safety-critical AX-04827-B2 axle housing forgings. Disposition: QUARANTINE. NCR: NCR-MER-2026-0253 (Critical, QTY) — draft sent to <@U005> for review. Awaiting acknowledgement from <@U003>, <@U004>.

:rotating_light: LINE-DOWN RISK: On-hand 22 units, consumption 12/day, risk window ~1.8 days (approximately 04/16/2026). Production Planning (<@U008>) is aware.
Production Planning confirms. We're watching AX-04827-B2 closely. If the missing 18 units don't arrive by end of day tomorrow, we'll need to adjust the production schedule for Line 3.
I see this. Elizabeth — please respond when you can. Sam, keep me updated.

Update on REC-007: Theo Brandt approved NCR-MER-2026-0253 at 13:00 CST. Letter sent to Meridian Steel Supply at 13:15 CST. Supplier response due 04/17/2026. Walter Finch CC'd. Elizabeth Velasquez has not yet responded to this escalation (notified 12:35 CST).

ESCALATION — OVERRIDE (CRITICAL NCR): REC-20260414-005 Line 001, Heartland Bearings LLC (SUP-0312, Probation), PO #MER-PO-108510. Trigger: Tier 2 functional damage on safety-critical BG-33044-A1 precision bearings. 30 of 144 units with machined surface scratches. Dollar value: $5,565.00 (30 damaged x $185.50). Disposition: QUARANTINE. NCR: NCR-MER-2026-0252 (Critical, DMG) — pending Theo Brandt review. Awaiting guidance from <@U004>, <@U002>.

:rotating_light: REPEAT-OFFENDER FLAG: SUP-0312 (Heartland Bearings LLC)
NCR count (rolling 90 days): 3 NCRs
- NCR-MER-2026-0245 (DMG, Resolved)
- NCR-MER-2026-0248 (DMG, Closed)
- NCR-MER-2026-0252 (DMG, Critical — today, pending)

Supplier status: Probation (since 03/01/2026)
Recommend immediate Probation review.
Notified: <@U005>, <@U006>, <@U003>.
Acknowledged. I'll pull the full supplier scorecard for SUP-0312 and have it ready for the review meeting. This is their third incident this quarter.

C004.text: Morning all. Shift change at 06:00, Sam Moreno on as Coordinator today. 5 inbound scheduled.
FYI — AX-04827-B2 stock is getting low. 34 units on hand, consumption ~12/day. Watching it closely. Expecting 96 in today's Estes delivery.
